# Chenbro Micom — Liquid-Cooled Server Chassis
Last updated: 2026-04-01

## Company Overview
- **HQ:** New Taipei City, Taiwan
- Listed on Taiwan Stock Exchange (8008.TW)
- Revenue: ~$200-300M USD annually
- Specialty: server chassis, rackmount enclosures, storage enclosures
- Customers: server OEMs, system integrators, enterprise IT

## Role in NVL72 Supply Chain
- Chenbro supplies **server chassis and rack infrastructure** with integrated liquid cooling pathways
- NVL72-adjacent role: Chenbro makes the chassis enclosures for liquid-cooled GPU servers
- They integrate the liquid cooling inlet/outlet bulkheads, internal routing guides, and mounting structures for manifold assemblies
- The "tray inner manifold" mounting structure and chassis cutouts for QD pass-throughs = Chenbro territory
- They do NOT make the manifold itself — they make the chassis it mounts into

## Products Relevant to NVL72
- GPU server chassis (4U, 8U, custom) with liquid cooling provisions
- Storage-dense liquid-cooled enclosures
- OCP-compliant chassis designs (ORV3 form factor support)
- Custom liquid cooling chassis for hyperscale ODM customers

## ADC Relevance
- Chenbro = structural chassis layer that houses the tray manifold
- If building custom ADC 3K pod chassis: Chenbro is a potential chassis ODM
- Also relevant for MARLIE 1 custom server builds

## Key Contacts
- Sales: chenbro.com/contact
- US distribution via Chenbro North America
